title: Accountant
description: Innovative Accountant proficient in extracting financial data from various reporting systems and suggesting key operational changes.
experience: Experienced Accountant and Administrator with a comprehensive background in financial management, system implementation, and operational improvements. Key responsibilities include performing debit/credit and total accounts, reconciling bank transactions, assisting with monthly financials, managing general ledger coding and vendor payments. Proven ability to streamline procedures with automation, introduce cost-saving accounting practices, and develop financial databases. Also adept in budget planning, payroll administration, and maintaining financial records for church operations, including significant cash handling and investment account management.
